tools.name: getHealth
tools.title: Health
tools.description: Operational health check for the NeNe Records API runtime.

tools.name: listEntityTypes
tools.title: List Entity Types
tools.description: List entity type schema definitions with pagination.

tools.name: createEntityType
tools.title: Create Entity Type
tools.description: Create a new entity type with a unique slug.

tools.name: getEntityTypeById
tools.title: Get Entity Type
tools.description: Get an entity type by id.

tools.name: updateEntityTypeById
tools.title: Update Entity Type
tools.description: Replace an entity type name and slug.

tools.name: deleteEntityTypeById
tools.title: Delete Entity Type
tools.description: Permanently delete an entity type.

tools.name: listEntities
tools.title: List Entities
tools.description: List entity records with optional entity_type_id, status, tag, and relation filters.

tag.description: Alias for a single tag slug or comma-separated slugs.

tools.name: listEntitiesByTag
tools.title: List Entities By Tag
tools.description: List entities matching any of the given tag slugs. Alias for listEntities with tags/tag query params.

tools.name: listEntitiesByRelationTarget
tools.title: List Entities By Relation Target
tools.description: List source entities whose relation field points to a target entity. Pass entity_type_id and query params named relation_{fieldKey} (e.g. relation_author=5). Multiple relation filters are ANDed.

entity_type_id.description: Entity type id of records to list.

additionalProperties.description: Relation filter query param. Use key relation_{fieldKey} with the target entity id as value.

tools.name: createEntity
tools.title: Create Entity
tools.description: Create a new entity record for an entity type.

tools.name: getEntityById
tools.title: Get Entity
tools.description: Get an entity record by id.

tools.name: getPublicRecordView
tools.title: Get Public Record View
tools.description: Aggregated bootstrap payload for a public consumer record detail page.

tools.name: updateEntityById
tools.title: Update Entity
tools.description: Update an entity record entity type id and publish status.

published_at.description: Override published_at timestamp (ISO 8601). Auto-set on first publish if omitted.

tools.name: deleteEntityById
tools.title: Delete Entity
tools.description: Soft-delete an entity record.

tools.name: listEntityTags
tools.title: List Entity Tags
tools.description: List tags attached to an entity.

tools.name: attachEntityTag
tools.title: Attach Entity Tag
tools.description: Attach a tag to an entity by tag id.

tools.name: detachEntityTag
tools.title: Detach Entity Tag
tools.description: Detach a tag from an entity.

tools.name: listEntityRelations
tools.title: List Entity Relations
tools.description: List relation targets attached to a source entity for a given relation field key.

field_key.description: Relation field key registered on the source entity type.

tools.name: attachEntityRelation
tools.title: Attach Entity Relation
tools.description: Attach a target entity to a source entity via a typed relation field. For cardinality=one fields, replaces the existing target.

field_key.description: Relation field key on the source entity type.

tools.name: getAccessStatsByDate
tools.title: Access Stats By Date
tools.description: Return daily HTTP access counts and average duration for an inclusive date range (YYYY-MM-DD).

to.description: End date (inclusive), YYYY-MM-DD. Range must not exceed 366 days.

tools.name: listFieldDefs
tools.title: List Field Definitions
tools.description: List registered field definitions, optionally filtered by entity type.

tools.name: createFieldDef
tools.title: Create Field Definition
tools.description: Register a field key and data type for an entity type.

tools.name: getFieldDefById
tools.title: Get Field Definition
tools.description: Get a field definition by id.

tools.name: updateFieldDefById
tools.title: Update Field Definition
tools.description: Replace a field definition.

tools.name: deleteFieldDefById
tools.title: Delete Field Definition
tools.description: Soft-delete a field definition.

tools.name: listTags
tools.title: List Tags
tools.description: List tag definitions with pagination.

tools.name: createTag
tools.title: Create Tag
tools.description: Create a new tag with a unique slug.

tools.name: getTagById
tools.title: Get Tag
tools.description: Get a tag by id.

tools.name: updateTagById
tools.title: Update Tag
tools.description: Replace a tag name and slug.

tools.name: deleteTagById
tools.title: Delete Tag
tools.description: Permanently delete a tag.

tools.name: listSettings
tools.title: List Settings
tools.description: List all site settings with effective values for admin use.

tools.name: listPublicSettings
tools.title: List Public Settings
tools.description: List public site settings for consumer pages.

tools.name: updateSettingByKey
tools.title: Update Setting
tools.description: Update a site setting value by key.

tools.name: listSettingRevisions
tools.title: List Setting Revisions
tools.description: List paginated revision history for a setting key.

tools.name: listMedia
tools.title: List Media
tools.description: List uploaded media items (newest first). Use this to find the media id for a theme manifest assets.preview / hero / background slot.

tools.name: getThemeEngineCss
tools.title: Theme Engine CSS
tools.description: Returns the deployed public-site base engine CSS. Use it to copy exact flag implementations (e.g. the rules under [data-cards='framed'] / [data-media='duotone']) — radius, border, padding — instead of guessing. Runtime themes restyle this engine via tokens and flags.

tools.name: getThemeAuthoringGuide
tools.title: Theme Authoring Guide
tools.description: Read this FIRST before creating or updating a runtime theme. Returns the manifest contract (required tokens, flag enums, token value rules, reserved ids), recipes, common mistakes and a minimal valid example manifest. Derived from the server validator so it matches exactly what createTheme/updateTheme enforce.

tools.name: listThemes
tools.title: List Runtime Themes
tools.description: List all runtime (data-driven) public-site themes for the organization.

tools.name: createTheme
tools.title: Create Runtime Theme
tools.description: Register a new runtime public-site theme. The input is the theme manifest (tokens + flags). The server validates structure and sanitises token values before storing; unsafe CSS and reserved ids are rejected.

id.description: Theme key/id. Must not collide with a built-in theme.

supportsModes.description: Must include both light and dark.

tokens.description: Per-mode CSS tokens: {"light":{token:value,…},"dark":{…}}. Keys are contract tokens; values must be safe CSS (no ;{}<>, url(), @import).

flags.description: Optional structural style flags (enumerated; e.g. feedLayout, headerLayout).

fonts.description: Optional metadata list of {family, role, source} (source must be fontsource or system). Note: does NOT load fonts at runtime — the public site only renders families bundled in the authoring guide renderModel.fonts.available; set those via the font-* tokens.

assets.description: Optional asset slots (preview/hero/background). Each value is a media id (positive integer, from listMedia) or a safe bundle-relative path. assets.preview drives the picker thumbnail.

tools.name: previewTheme
tools.title: Preview Runtime Theme
tools.description: Compute a no-browser preview of a theme manifest: returns the tokens that would render (safe-filtered), the ones dropped, and WCAG contrast for key pairs (light/dark). Non-persistent — use to self-correct contrast/quality before createTheme/updateTheme.

id.description: Theme key/id. Must not collide with a built-in theme.

supportsModes.description: Must include both light and dark.

tokens.description: Per-mode CSS tokens: {"light":{token:value,…},"dark":{…}}. Keys are contract tokens; values must be safe CSS (no ;{}<>, url(), @import).

flags.description: Optional structural style flags (enumerated; e.g. feedLayout, headerLayout).

fonts.description: Optional metadata list of {family, role, source} (source must be fontsource or system). Note: does NOT load fonts at runtime — the public site only renders families bundled in the authoring guide renderModel.fonts.available; set those via the font-* tokens.

assets.description: Optional asset slots (preview/hero/background). Each value is a media id (positive integer, from listMedia) or a safe bundle-relative path. assets.preview drives the picker thumbnail.

tools.name: getTheme
tools.title: Get Runtime Theme
tools.description: Get a single runtime theme by its key.

tools.name: updateTheme
tools.title: Update Runtime Theme
tools.description: Replace an existing runtime theme manifest. The manifest id must match the key in the path.

key.description: Theme key (must equal the manifest id).

id.description: Theme key/id. Must not collide with a built-in theme.

supportsModes.description: Must include both light and dark.

tokens.description: Per-mode CSS tokens: {"light":{token:value,…},"dark":{…}}. Keys are contract tokens; values must be safe CSS (no ;{}<>, url(), @import).

flags.description: Optional structural style flags (enumerated; e.g. feedLayout, headerLayout).

fonts.description: Optional metadata list of {family, role, source} (source must be fontsource or system). Note: does NOT load fonts at runtime — the public site only renders families bundled in the authoring guide renderModel.fonts.available; set those via the font-* tokens.

assets.description: Optional asset slots (preview/hero/background). Each value is a media id (positive integer, from listMedia) or a safe bundle-relative path. assets.preview drives the picker thumbnail.

tools.name: deleteTheme
tools.title: Delete Runtime Theme
tools.description: Permanently delete a runtime theme by its key.
